name: Buzz
tagline: Grow your audience by engaging — replies, comments, likes, follows.
description: Buzz is your social media engagement specialist. Where Broadcast posts, Buzz works the room: it replies to comments, joins relevant conversations, likes and follows the right accounts, and nurtures your community — authentically and within each platform's rules.
capabilities: Reply to comments and DMs in your brand voice
Like, comment on, and follow relevant accounts and conversations
Find and join the right hashtags, threads, and communities
Triage mentions — surface what needs a human, handle the rest
Report engagement activity and what's actually working
example_prompts: Find recent posts about gospel reggae and leave 5 genuine, on-brand comments.
Reply to today's comments on my latest X post in my voice.
Follow 10 accounts in my niche and engage with their latest post.
